summary: Iteration 17: ePaper title condensation and summary trimming features verified. Backend: All 10 tests passed - titles are under 85 chars (AI condensed), summaries end with complete sentences (no '...' truncation). Frontend: Page renders correctly with no visible truncation dots, page navigation (1/2) works, AM/PM toggle works, archive bar visible.

passed_tests: Morning summaries end with complete sentences
Evening summaries end with complete sentences
UI: No ellipsis '...' visible on page
UI: No CSS line-clamp classes used
UI: Archive bar with date buttons visible

critical_code_review_comments: condense_title_for_epaper() correctly uses AI (Gemini Flash) to condense titles >80 chars
trim_to_complete_sentences() properly removes trailing ellipsis and finds sentence boundaries
NewspaperPage.jsx no longer uses CSS line-clamp for headlines or summaries
Backend caches condensed titles in epaper_title field for performance

test_credentials.guest: No login required - navigate directly to /epaper

seed_data_creation: Used existing data - tested with 2026-03-07 date (morning/evening editions)
context_for_next_testing_agent: ePaper title/summary features working: (1) condense_title_for_epaper() in helpers.py condenses long titles using Gemini Flash AI, (2) trim_to_complete_sentences() ensures summaries end at sentence boundaries, (3) Frontend NewspaperPage.jsx renders without CSS truncation. Key test file: test_epaper_title_summary.py verifies all title/summary constraints.
